title: BEM-615 hourly selftest
objective:
Run script:
"""
sep='\n'
reports=Path('governance/reports'); reports.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
proofs=Path('governance/codex/proofs'); proofs.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
transport=Path('governance/transport/results.jsonl'); transport.parent.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
contour=Path('governance/state/contour_status.json'); contour.parent.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
state_dir=Path('governance/state'); state_dir.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)

renderer=Path('scripts/render_curator_hourly_report.py')
recorder=Path('scripts/record_curator_hourly_delivery.py')
workflow=Path('.github/workflows/curator-hourly-report.yml')
message=Path('governance/tmp/curator_hourly_report_message.txt')

checks=[]
for name,path in [('renderer',renderer),('recorder',recorder),('workflow',workflow)]:
    checks.append({'name':name+'_exists','pass':path.exists(),'path':str(path)})

# Syntax compile without shell.
for name,path in [('renderer',renderer),('recorder',recorder)]:
    ok=False; err=None
    if path.exists():
        try:
            compile(path.read_text(encoding='utf-8'), str(path), 'exec')
            ok=True
        except Exception as e:
            err=str(e)
    checks.append({'name':name+'_compile','pass':ok,'error':err})

# Execute renderer in-process to create sample message.
run_ok=False; run_err=None
if renderer.exists():
    try:
        ns={'__name__':'__main__'}
        exec(compile(renderer.read_text(encoding='utf-8'), str(renderer), 'exec'), ns)
        run_ok=True
    except Exception as e:
        run_err=str(e)
checks.append({'name':'renderer_execute','pass':run_ok,'error':run_err})

text=message.read_text(encoding='utf-8', errors='ignore') if message.exists() else ''
required=['BEM-HOURLY','Этап:','Дорожная карта:','Чек-лист:','Мониторинг:','Provider route','Основной контур','Резервный контур','Telegram delivery','Blocker','Следующее действие']
for item in required:
    checks.append({'name':'message_contains_'+item,'pass':item in text})

# Check schedule rule: only curator-hourly-report.yml may include schedule.
schedule_files=[]
for p in Path('.github/workflows').glob('*.yml'):
    if 'schedule:' in p.read_text(errors='ignore'):
        schedule_files.append(str(p))
for p in Path('.github/workflows').glob('*.yaml'):
    if 'schedule:' in p.read_text(errors='ignore'):
        schedule_files.append(str(p))
checks.append({'name':'schedule_only_curator_hourly','pass':schedule_files==['.github/workflows/curator-hourly-report.yml'],'schedule_files':schedule_files})

# Wide table guard: hourly message should not have pipe-table header.
checks.append({'name':'no_wide_markdown_pipe_table_in_message','pass':'|---' not in text and text.count('|') < 5})

all_pass=all(x.get('pass') for x in checks)
status='pass' if all_pass else 'failed'
blocker=None if all_pass else {'code':'HOURLY_REPORT_RENDERER_SELFTEST_FAILED','failed':[x for x in checks if not x.get('pass')]}

selftest={'schema_version':'hourly_report_selftest.v1','selftest_id':'bem615_hourly_report_renderer_selftest','status':status,'checks':checks,'message_preview':text[:2000],'blocker':blocker,'created_at':'2026-05-18 | 06:45 (UTC+3)'}
state_file=state_dir/'bem615_hourly_report_renderer_selftest.json'
state_file.write_text(json.dumps(selftest,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
report=reports/'bem615_hourly_report_renderer_selftest.md'
report.write_text('# BEM-615 | Hourly Report Renderer Selftest | '+status.upper()+sep+sep+'Дата: 2026-05-18 | 06:45 (UTC+3)'+sep+sep+'## Checks'+sep+sep+sep.join(['- '+x['name']+': '+('PASS' if x.get('pass') else 'FAIL') for x in checks])+sep+sep+'## Message preview'+sep+'```text'+sep+text[:1600]+sep+'```'+sep+sep+'## Blocker'+sep+('null' if blocker is None else json.dumps(blocker,ensure_ascii=False,indent=2))+sep)
record={'record_type':'bem615_hourly_report_renderer_selftest','cycle_id':'bem615-hourly-report-renderer-selftest','source':'gpt_executor_reserve','status':status,'state_file':str(state_file),'blocker':blocker,'created_at':'2026-05-18 | 06:45 (UTC+3)'}
with transport.open('a',encoding='utf-8') as handle: handle.write(json.dumps(record,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
state={}
if contour.exists():
    try: state=json.loads(contour.read_text(errors='ignore'))
    except Exception: state={}
state['bem615_hourly_report_renderer_selftest']={'status':status,'state_file':str(state_file),'message_file':str(message),'blocker':blocker}
state['hourly_report_template_flow']='renderer_selftest_'+status
state['updated_at']='2026-05-18 | 06:45 (UTC+3)'; state['blocker']=blocker
contour.write_text(json.dumps(state,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
proof=proofs/'bem615_hourly_report_renderer_selftest.txt'
proof.write_text('BEM-615 '+status.upper()+': hourly renderer selftest completed.\n')
changed_files.extend([str(state_file),str(report),str(transport),str(contour),str(proof),str(message)])
ops_applied.append('Ran hourly report renderer selftest: syntax, message canon, schedule rule, and mobile readability')
"""
No issue comments.
